chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 794 of 2010 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For orders on CMA No.720/2024 (Review) 23.05.2024 Mr. Abrar Raza Ghumro, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel does not press this review application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
